text.title: Audience OKR Template (Indie) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Audience OKR Template (Indie) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: define-segment
step.action: Pin one audience segment with ICP definition + baseline metrics.

step.name: write-objective
step.action: Write one qualitative Objective scoped to the segment.

step.name: schedule-check-in
step.action: Block weekly 15-min check-in slot; pick check-in day.

step.name: operate-weekly
step.action: Each week: 1-row update per KR; flag at-risk; replan if 2+ KRs at-risk.

step.name: grade-quarter
step.action: Grade each KR 0.0-1.0; retro decision per KR.
